title: Chacrah #2641
definition:
Hasrah = "lack"

 1) grandfather of Shallum who was the husband of Huldah, the
    prophetess; also spelled 'Harhas'
nasbUsage:

 1) grandfather of Shallum who was the husband of Huldah, the
    prophetess; also spelled 'Harhas'
